name: Impossible Mexican Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces green chiles, drained, seeded and chopped
1 cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese (about 4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2 inches, lightly.
3. Cook and stir ground beef and onion until the beef is brown; drain excess fat.
4. Stir in taco seasoning mix.
5. Spread the beef mixture in the pie plate.
6. Sprinkle with green chiles and shredded cheese.
7. Beat remaining ingredients (milk, bisquick, eggs, red pepper sauce) together until smooth for 15 seconds using a blender on high speed or for 1 minute with a hand beater.
8. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
9. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, about 25 to 30 minutes.
10. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
11. Refrigerate any remaining pie. Serves 6 to 8.
